metadata.description: Two-Weeks-Team marketplace hosting the PitchForge plugin — one Socratic interview turns a project into a 60-300s cinematic, recording-ready demo deck via 7-phase pipeline. Sibling to Preview Forge.

plugins.name: pitch
plugins.description: PitchForge — one Socratic interview → 7-phase workflow (Brief / Scenario / Storyboard / Tone / Deck / Animate / Record) → single self-contained HTML deck that doubles as the recording source. 13 agents, 15 /pitch:* commands, 9 frame shapes, 5 narrative arcs, 3 OKLCH palettes, 3 Layer-0 hooks. Built with Opus 4.7.
